hero.title: Your Personal Supplement Recommendation
hero.subtitle: Data-driven. Cross-brand. Individual.
hero.description: NutriMatch analyzes your health data, lifestyle and goals – and finds the best supplements from different brands for you.

personalized.title: Personalized
personalized.description: Based on your questionnaire, wearable data and optional lab results.

cross_brand.title: Cross-Brand
cross_brand.description: We compare products from different providers – not just one brand.

transparent.title: Transparent
transparent.description: Every recommendation is backed by scientific sources and expert knowledge.

adaptive.title: Adaptive
adaptive.description: Your recommendations adapt when your lifestyle or data changes.

step1.title: Fill Out Questionnaire
step1.description: Answer questions about health, diet, allergies and goals.

step2.title: Connect Data
step2.description: Optionally connect your smartwatch or fitness app for better recommendations.

step3.title: Get Recommendations
step3.description: Receive an individual supplement plan with price comparison.

step4.title: Regular Updates
step4.description: Your recommendations are automatically updated when your data changes.

questionnaire.title: Personal Questionnaire
questionnaire.subtitle: Answer the following questions for your individual recommendation.
questionnaire.goals_select: What do you want to improve?

dashboard.title: Your Dashboard
dashboard.no_recommendations: No recommendations yet. Please fill out the questionnaire first.

footer.disclaimer: NutriMatch does not provide medical diagnoses. The platform serves as data-based support for choosing dietary supplements.
